# Parsing Flags

**API Collection**

Options for parsing words to add to the text.

## Overview

Specify these options for [doc://com.apple.latentsemanticmapping/documentation/LatentSemanticMapping/LSMTextAddWords(_:_:_:_:)].

## Constants

- **kLSMTextApplySpamHeuristics**: An option that specifies the parser should attempt to find words in hostile text.
- **kLSMTextPreserveAcronyms**: An option that specifies the parser shouldn’t map all-uppercase words to lowercase.
- **kLSMTextPreserveCase**: An option that specifies the parser shouldn’t change any words to lowercase.

## Adding to the Text

- **LSMTextAddToken(_:_:)**: Adds an arbitrary binary token to the text.
- **LSMTextAddWord(_:_:)**: Adds a word to the text.
- **LSMTextAddWords(_:_:_:_:)**: Breaks a string into words using the specified locale, and adds the words to the text.
